protected_core.task_goal: Tighten controller run-to-completion rules so wave completion deterministically promotes the next eligible wave or reaches an explicit terminal state.
protected_core.expected_output: Updated controller docs, queue surface, and a contract-valid checkpoint for run-policy semantics.
protected_core.current_step: Record run_policy, eligibility, and terminal-state logic in controller truth.
protected_core.resume_point: If a future auto wave becomes eligible, activate it immediately. If only explicit-request waves remain, return WAITING_APPROVAL with the exact wave name.
hard_constraints: Only controller may emit final ABORT.
Missing evidence fails soft to HOLD or REVIEW, never ABORT.
Do not enable controller flags globally unless explicitly requested.
Do not reopen closed lanes without the required exact blocker packet.
business_invariants: Memphis-only 90 day PoC scope remains frozen.
Instinct8 runtime-hook capability stays additive and default-off.
Controlled flag-on validation is user-request gated.

compaction.halo_summary: Controller truth now encodes wave run_policy, eligibility, and terminal-state rules. Current state is WAITING_APPROVAL because only an explicit-request wave remains.
